title: Phase 1: Genesis Launch
description: The foundational phase of the Mycelium Protocol ecosystem. Focus on core infrastructure: Cos72 Chrome Extension, Sign90 base version, AirAccount invisible crypto account, SuperPaymaster gas payment, and Comet ENS subdomain service.
rawContent:
## Description

The foundational phase of the Mycelium Protocol ecosystem. Focus on core infrastructure: Cos72 Chrome Extension, Sign90 base version, AirAccount invisible crypto account, SuperPaymaster gas payment, and Comet ENS subdomain service.

title: Phase 2: Community Expansion
description: Expanding the ecosystem with community-focused features: KMS/TEE trusted execution environment, Zu.Coffee business DApp, and community engagement tools.
rawContent:
## Description

Expanding the ecosystem with community-focused features: KMS/TEE trusted execution environment, Zu.Coffee business DApp, and community engagement tools.

title: Phase 3: Ecosystem Maturity
description: Mature ecosystem phase: Asset3 personal asset management, OpenNest scaling protocol, Spores viral transmission SDK, Park sustainable public goods, TradeStar trading training, and CoinJar self-host piggy bank.
rawContent:
## Description

Mature ecosystem phase: Asset3 personal asset management, OpenNest scaling protocol, Spores viral transmission SDK, Park sustainable public goods, TradeStar trading training, and CoinJar self-host piggy bank.

title: Research
description: Research, papers, and article publication work. Related to but separate from development milestones (Phase 1/2/3) — research tasks may cross-link to development tasks in any phase.
rawContent:
## Description

Research, papers, and article publication work. Related to but separate from development milestones (Phase 1/2/3) — research tasks may cross-link to development tasks in any phase.
